subject: [NBI] Use AAF init container for certificates
commit_message:
[NBI] Use AAF init container for certificates

Onboard server certificates for HTTPs via AAF init containers.

Issue-ID: EXTAPI-375
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Icbcf075dd2dd8588aa9f14d23974a122bde38ae7

Patch Set 28:

I agree with Sylvain. The DMaaP communication is internal, in fact DMaaP own healthchecks are currently only http, not https. We need to move forward in NBI to test the use cases ( BBS/5G Slicing with NBI https ). If we can prove trustStore is working correctly from NBI to other components AAI/ SDC we can change and try DMaaP https again. But that is not a must have.  We need to finish Frankfurt must haves first which includes this merge for NBI https /AAF integration for external port 30274, otherwise we continue to be stuck
